stemHtml: Holding short, an Airbus is on short final. ATC tells Fastair56Y to line up and wait behind it. What is the correct readback?

options.a: Fastair56Y, line up and wait, behind the Airbus
options.b: Fastair56Y, behind the Airbus, line up and wait
options.c: Behind the Airbus, Fastair56Y, line up and wait
options.d: Behind the Airbus, line up and wait behind, Fastair 56Y
